---
title: "AI/ML Foundations and Applications"
description: "From perceptrons to transformers — history, theory, and R implementations of AI and ML."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
120 TUTORIALS
:::

# AI/ML Foundations and Applications

From perceptrons to transformers — history, theory, and R implementations of AI and ML.
